message:
feat(policy): integrate tamper-evident AuditChain into PolicyEngine authorize pipeline

Wire AuditChain into PolicyEngine following the QuarantineRegistry integration
pattern: held as a field, initialized in constructors, wired from SafetyConfig,
and recorded at every authorize() call. Deny and RequireApproval decisions are
always chained; Allow decisions are optionally recorded via config.

- Add AuditChainConfig to SafetyConfig with serde(default) for backwards compat
- Add AuditChain field to PolicyEngine, from_config wiring
- Record policy decisions to audit chain in record_to_decision_log()
- Add 8 integration tests in policy.rs (deny/allow/approval/quarantine/bounded)
- Add 4 unit tests for AuditChainConfig serde and from_config
- Add 3 config tests for SafetyConfig audit_chain defaults/roundtrip/compat

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
